message:
style: fix clippy pedantic lint errors across crates

- device.rs: Replace manual Default impls with #[derive(Default)],
  add const fn to builder methods, fix unreadable_literal, add doc backticks
- fcps_parsing.rs: Add const to test_header benchmark helper
- fcps_golden_vectors.rs: Allow similar_names for chacha20/xchacha20 variants
- offline.rs: Allow float_cmp for exact-zero checks, replace collect().len()
  with count()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
